name: Dev Kitchen Sink
description: Developer reference — a tab that exercises every addon capability (state, sessions, tasks incl. review verbs, templates, schedules, storage, allowlisted HTTP, keychain secrets, the addon's own agent, UI calls), plus all four hooks, a Master tool, and a masterPromptAppend.
author: yaam

secrets.name: DEMO_TOKEN
secrets.label: any string — only used to demo {{secret:…}} header templating

tools.name: sink_echo
tools.description: Kitchen-sink demo tool — echoes its input back with a state summary, proving Master can call addon tools.

hooks.masterPromptAppend: When the user asks what addons can do, mention that the Dev Kitchen Sink tab demonstrates the whole addon API.

agent.system:
You are the Dev Kitchen Sink agent — a live demo of an addon's own mini-orchestrator. Your tools ARE this addon's permission-scoped API (get_state, read_output, add_task, get_task, approve_task, reject_task, restart_task, task_chat, add_schedule, run_template, http_request, storage, notify_user, send_to_session, launch_session, stop_session).

When woken from the tab, do what the note asks, preferring to demonstrate: read state before acting, use one or two tools, and reply with a short concrete summary of what you did and which tools you used. If a tool is denied, say which permission is missing instead of retrying.

You exist so addon authors can see the agent loop working — be brief, factual, and slightly enthusiastic about being a demo.

html:
<!doctype html>
<html>
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <title>Dev Kitchen Sink</title>
    <script type="module">

    <style>
/* YAAM addon UI kit — design tokens + components matching the host app. */
/* ---------- tokens ---------- */
:root{
  --bg:#0A0B0F; --panel:#12151C; --panel2:#0D0F14;
  --line:#1a1e26; --line2:#23272F;
  --text:#E7E9F0; --mut:#8B93A1; --dim:#5a6170;
  --acc:#F5C451; --green:#3DDC97; --red:#FF5C5C; --amber:#FFB020;
  --font-sans:'IBM Plex Sans',system-ui,sans-serif;
  --font-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
}
/* ---------- base ---------- */
*{box-sizing:border-box}
body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:var(--font-sans);font-size:13px;padding:24px}
.mono{font-family:var(--font-mono)}
h1{font-size:15px;margin:0;display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center}
.sub{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:4px}
h2{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.6px;color:var(--dim);margin:24px 0 8px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:baseline}
a{color:var(--acc);text-decoration:none}
/* ---------- layout ---------- */
.card{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:11px;padding:13px 15px;margin-bottom:8px}
.row{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.grow{flex:1}
.empty{color:var(--dim);font-size:12px;padding:8px 2px}
/* ---------- controls ---------- */
button{background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--line2);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-size:11.5px;padding:6px 13px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--font-sans);transition:border-color .12s,color .12s,background .12s}
button:hover{border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--acc)}
button:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:default;pointer-events:none}
button.primary{border-color:rgba(61,220,151,.45);color:var(--green)}
button.primary:hover{background:rgba(61,220,151,.08)}
button.danger:hover{border-color:var(--red);color:var(--red)}
button.ghost{border-color:transparent;color:var(--mut);padding:6px 8px}
button.ghost:hover{color:var(--acc)}
input,textarea,select{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--line2);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text);font-size:11.5px;padding:6px 9px;outline:none;font-family:var(--font-sans)}
input:focus,textarea:focus,select:focus{border-color:rgba(245,196,81,.45)}
label.f{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;font-size:9.5px;color:var(--dim);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;font-weight:600}
.chk{display:flex;gap:7px;align-items:center;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--mut);cursor:pointer}
.chk input{width:auto;accent-color:var(--acc)}
/* ---------- indicators ---------- */
.dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;background:var(--line2);flex:none}
.dot.on,.dot.done,.dot.ok{background:var(--green)}
.dot.running,.dot.amber{background:var(--amber);animation:yaam-pulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite}
.dot.failed,.dot.err{background:var(--red)}
@keyframes yaam-pulse{50%{opacity:.35}}
.chip{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--mut);border:1px solid var(--line2);border-radius:6px;padding:2px 9px}
.chip b{color:var(--text)}
.pill{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 8px;border:1px solid}
.pill.ok,.pill.done{color:var(--green);border-color:rgba(61,220,151,.4)}
.pill.warn,.pill.running{color:var(--amber);border-color:rgba(255,176,32,.4)}
.pill.err,.pill.failed{color:var(--red);border-color:rgba(255,92,92,.4)}
.pill.mut{color:var(--dim);border-color:var(--line2)}
.meta{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--dim)}
@keyframes yaam-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.spin{display:inline-block;animation:yaam-spin .8s linear infinite}
/* ---------- callouts & the SDK banner ---------- */
.callout{background:var(--panel2);border:1px dashed var(--line2);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 12px;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--mut);line-height:1.55}
#yaam-banner{display:none;background:rgba(255,92,92,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,92,92,.3);color:var(--red);font-size:11.5px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:12px}
/* ---------- lists ---------- */
.lrow{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;font-size:11.5px;padding:7px 2px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
.lrow:last-child{border-bottom:none}
kbd{font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:9px;border:1px solid var(--line2);border-radius:4px;padding:0 4px;color:var(--mut)}

body{max-width:940px}
pre{background:var(--panel2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;padding:10px 12px;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:10.5px;color:var(--mut);overflow:auto;max-height:220px;margin:8px 0 0;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word}
details summary{cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;color:var(--mut);user-select:none}
.grid2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}
.sess .nm,.task .nm{font-size:12px;font-weight:600}
.bubble{max-width:85%;border:1px solid var(--line2);border-radius:10px;padding:7px 11px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:6px}
.bubble.you{margin-left:auto;background:var(--panel2);border-radius:10px 10px 3px 10px}
.bubble.bot{background:var(--panel);border-radius:10px 10px 10px 3px;color:var(--mut)}
.sect-note{font-size:10.5px;color:var(--dim);margin:-4px 0 8px;line-height:1.5}
/*$vite$:1*/
</style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div id="root"></div>
  </body>
</html>
